message:
feat(fcp-host): harden enforcement validation and update infrastructure

Enforcement module (enforcement.rs) gains ~50 lines of improved
validation logic for connector manifest compliance checking, including
better error messages and more thorough contract verification.

Infrastructure:
- .rchignore: add new patterns for remote compilation exclusions
- Cargo.lock: update with new dependency (single addition)
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state with latest progress
  on connector work items and dependency tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
